narrative:
Precinct Ashtabula Twp. 6 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 462 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
